description: Add GC scope guard for processor copies created off the game thread in AppendUniqueRuntimeProcessorCopies (Recall)

remove: // unfortunately the const cast is required since NewObject doesn't support const Template object
UMassProcessor* ProcCopy = NewObject<UMassProcessor>(&InOwner, Proc->GetClass(), FName(), RF_NoFlags, const_cast<UMassProcessor*>(Proc));
add: // unfortunately the const cast is required since NewObject doesn't support const Template object
UMassProcessor* ProcCopy = NewObject<UMassProcessor>(&InOwner, Proc->GetClass(), FName(), RF_NoFlags, const_cast<UMassProcessor*>(Proc));
UMassProcessor* ProcCopy = NewObject<UMassProcessor>(&InOwner, Proc->GetClass(), FName(), RF_NoFlags, const_cast<UMassProcessor*>(Proc));
